name: RABBIT-FILE-BUG-3
title: rabbit-backlog and rabbit-bug feature directories not removed after unification into rabbit-file
description: rabbit-file was created to unify rabbit-bug and rabbit-backlog into a single feature. However, both legacy feature directories (.claude/features/rabbit-backlog and .claude/features/rabbit-bug) still exist on main as of the latest pull. They should have been deleted as part of the unification. Their continued presence creates confusion: the feature registry lists them as active features, rabbit-feature-scope may resolve requests to them instead of rabbit-file, and their scripts (file-bug.sh, bug-status.sh, list-bugs.sh, file-backlog-item.sh, etc.) remain callable. Correct state: both directories deleted, rabbit-file is the sole owner of bug and backlog lifecycle.

history.note: Deleted .claude/features/rabbit-bug and .claude/features/rabbit-backlog. Updated workspace-structure.json, test-find-feature.py, and rabbit-triage references.
